Class ReplyStorage

java.lang.Object
entityClasses.ReplyStorage
public class ReplyStorage extends Object
Stores replies in memory and lets other classes get them. Handles basic operations on replies.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ReplyStorage()
    Makes a new storage list.

  • Method Details

    • addReply

      public void addReply(Reply reply)
      Adds a reply to the list.
      Parameters:
      reply - the reply to add

    • getReplyById

      public Reply getReplyById(int id)
      Finds a reply by id.
      Parameters:
      id - the reply id
      Returns:
      the reply

    • updateReply

      public void updateReply(int id, String newBody)
      Updates a reply body.
      Parameters:
      id - the reply id
      newBody - the updated body

    • deleteReply

      public void deleteReply(int id)
      Deletes a reply by id.
      Parameters:
      id - the reply id

    • getRepliesForPost

      public List<Reply> getRepliesForPost(int postId)
      Gets all replies for a post.
      Parameters:
      postId - the post id
      Returns:
      the replies for the post

    • getRepliesByFilter

      public List<Reply> getRepliesByFilter(String filter)
      Filters replies by keyword.
      Parameters:
      filter - the search text
      Returns:
      the matching replies

    • getAllReplies

      public List<Reply> getAllReplies()
      Returns all replies (copy of list).
      Returns:
      all replies

    • exists

      public boolean exists(int id)
      Checks if a reply exists.
      Parameters:
      id - the reply id
      Returns:
      true if the reply exists

    • clearAll

      public void clearAll()
      Clears the whole list.
